placeholder_tmdb_key: Enter your own API Key if the common one fails...
lbl_backup_desc: Creates a compressed file with your database, settings, world images, and a Letterboxd-ready history.
lbl_cloud_desc: Sync your entire catalog to the secure cloud. Recover your progress on any computer with a single click.
msg_login_required: You must login with Discord first.
msg_confirm_cloud_restore: This will overwrite your current catalog with the cloud backup. Are you sure?
msg_cloud_restore_success: Cloud history restored. Please restart the application.
msg_restart_required: Please restart the application to apply all visual changes.
msg_export_success: Your backup has been created successfully.
msg_confirm_restore: This will overwrite your current catalog. Continue?
msg_confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this title?
msg_trailer_not_found: No trailer found for this title.
msg_fix_first: You must use 'Fix' to link this title to TMDb first.
msg_fix_error: No title found with that IMDb ID.
msg_vip_blocked:
🔒 Link Protected. PREMIUM Rank or Allied Map required to view this link.

Support us on Ko-fi to unlock!
msg_tmdb_quota_content:
The common TMDb key has reached its request limit. 

Please enter your own API Key in Settings to continue searching for movies and series without interruptions.
msg_confirm_delete_link: Are you sure you want to delete only this link?
lbl_stub_vrchat_desc: Helps YouTube videos work more reliably inside VRChat. Close VRChat before installing or removing this.
lbl_stub_enabled: Use the improved YouTube support for VRChat
lbl_stub_restore_exit: When closing VRCMT, remove the improvement and restore VRChat’s original
lbl_stub_target_exe: Path to VRChat’s yt-dlp (you usually don’t need to change this):
lbl_stub_gh_token: GitHub token (only if required for download):
lbl_stub_step_link: ① If someone gave you a link, paste it here (otherwise use the button below to pick a file):
lbl_stub_step_cookies: ② Only if YouTube asks you to sign in: cookies file (optional).
lbl_stub_step_actions: ③ Pick an action (tip: tap «Save» first, then install):
btn_stub_update_manifest: ⬇️ Download and install from the internet
btn_stub_install_file: 📂 I already have the file on my PC…
msg_stub_help_body:
VRChat uses a small tool (yt-dlp) to open YouTube links.

This replaces it with a newer build so videos fail less often. If someone gave you a download link, paste it above and tap «Download and install». If you received a .exe file, use «I already have the file on my PC».

Close VRChat before installing or removing. To undo, tap «Remove improvement».
msg_stub_need_url: Paste the link in the box first (the update link you were given), or use «I already have the file on my PC…» if you don’t have a link.
msg_stub_restore_confirm:
VRChat will go back to its original YouTube tool.
Are you sure? (Close VRChat if it’s running.)
msg_stub_saved: Done. Your YouTube / VRChat settings are saved.
stub_sum_disabled: The improvement is off. Turn on the checkbox above and tap «Save» if you want to use it.
stub_sum_no_exe: Can’t find VRChat’s yt-dlp. Launch VRChat at least once, or check the path under advanced options.
stub_sum_ok: Status: all set. The improvement is installed.
stub_sum_reswap: Heads-up: VRChat may have replaced the file. Tap «Download and install» or restart VRCMT to fix it.
stub_sum_not_installed: You turned the improvement on but it isn’t installed yet. Tap «Download and install» or «I already have the file…».
stub_tip_click_hint: Click the «?» to open this explanation in a window.
stub_tip_why_button: Opens a short explanation window. You can also hover the «?» icons next to each item to read detailed help without leaving this screen.
stub_tip_section_title:
This whole section changes the small program VRChat uses to open YouTube links (usually called yt-dlp).

The “improvement” is another compatible executable, often newer. VRCMT can keep a backup of the original, install the replacement, and if VRChat overwrites the file again, try to reinstall the improvement when you launch VRCMT.

Close VRChat before installing or removing the improvement so Windows doesn’t lock the file.
stub_tip_summary:
This box summarizes the current state in plain language:

• Whether the improvement is disabled in settings.
• Whether VRChat’s program is missing (it usually appears after launching VRChat once).
• Whether the improvement is installed and matches what VRCMT last installed.
• Whether VRChat may have replaced the file and you should reinstall or restart VRCMT.
• Whether you enabled the improvement in settings but haven’t installed the new executable yet.

Technical details (hashes, versions) are under “Advanced options”.
stub_tip_enabled:
When checked, you tell VRCMT you want the YouTube improvement for VRChat.

Main effects:
• On startup, if the improvement was installed and VRChat changed the file, the app tries to put the improvement back (from local cache or by downloading again).
• It refreshes the sidecar cookie file the improvement reads.

Checking the box alone does not install anything—you still use “Download and install” or “I already have the file…”, and you should tap “Save”.
stub_tip_restore_exit:
If checked, when you quit VRCMT it will try to automatically restore VRChat’s original yt-dlp from the backup on your PC.

Useful if you only want the improvement while VRCMT runs and prefer VRChat “stock” when you close the tracker.

A backup must exist (created the first time an install succeeds). Close VRChat first when possible to avoid copy errors.
stub_tip_link_field:
Paste the web address (URL) of a JSON file called a “manifest” that describes the update.

It usually includes:
• Executable version.
• A direct link to download the .exe.
• A SHA256 fingerprint so downloads aren’t corrupt or tampered with.

Whoever maintains the stub or docs normally gives you that URL. If you don’t have one, leave this empty and use “I already have the file on my PC…”.

When you tap “Download and install”, VRCMT saves what you typed here first even if you didn’t tap “Save”.
stub_tip_cookies:
Some videos or channels need YouTube to know you’re signed in (age, region, restricted content, etc.).

Export cookies from your browser as a Netscape-format text file (common extensions/tools) and pick that file here.

VRCMT stores the path and writes a small file in your data folder (%LOCALAPPDATA%\VRCMT) that the improvement reads on startup.

If you don’t hit login walls, leave this empty. Never share your cookies file—it’s like a password.
stub_tip_step_actions:
• Save: writes checkboxes, link, cookies, and advanced options to disk and updates the cookie sidecar.

• Download and install: needs the manifest link above; downloads the .exe, verifies the hash, and replaces VRChat’s yt-dlp (with a backup of the original).

• I already have the file: you pick a .exe you were given; same replacement with backup.

• Remove improvement: restores the original executable from backup.

VRChat should be closed in all cases when possible.
stub_tip_save:
Saves everything in this section to VRCMT’s config: improvement on/off, restore on exit, manifest link, cookie path, custom yt-dlp path, optional token.

Also writes vrchat_stub.json in your VRCMT folder so the improvement knows about cookies.

Tap this before installing so you don’t lose what you typed.
stub_tip_download:
Downloads the manifest JSON from the URL you entered, reads the installer URL and expected SHA256, downloads the .exe, and checks the hash.

If all is well, it backs up VRChat’s current yt-dlp (first time only) and replaces the file in VRChat’s Tools folder.

Requires a link in the box above; if it’s empty, the app will tell you. Close VRChat first to avoid copy failures.

If the manifest version isn’t newer than what’s installed, you may see a message that you’re already up to date.
stub_tip_install_file:
Opens a file dialog so you can choose a yt-dlp.exe you already downloaded (e.g. sent on Discord or saved manually).

It backs up VRChat’s current executable if needed and replaces the file on disk.

You don’t need the manifest link for this path. Close VRChat first.

Before installing, VRCMT saves what’s on screen (link, cookies, etc.) so configuration stays consistent.
stub_tip_restore_btn:
Tries to put back VRChat’s original yt-dlp using the backup stored in VRCMT’s backups folder.

You’ll be asked to confirm. If VRChat is running, Windows may lock the file—close it first.

This doesn’t erase every copy of the improvement; a cache may remain if you want to reinstall later.
stub_tip_advanced:
Settings most people don’t need.

• Custom path to VRChat’s yt-dlp: only if your install isn’t in the usual place.
• GitHub token: only if manifest or exe download needs auth (private repos or API limits).
• Technical details: registered version, whether the stub matches on disk, hash snippets, etc.

Tap the button to show or hide these options.
stub_tip_target_path:
Full path to the yt-dlp.exe VRChat runs. On a typical Windows install it lives under AppData\LocalLow\VRChat\VRChat\Tools\.

Leave empty so VRCMT uses that default. Fill it only for portable installs, custom folders, or if support gave you a path.

If the path is wrong or not an .exe, install/restore will fail until you fix it and save.
stub_tip_github_token:
Some GitHub downloads (manifest or exe) fail due to anonymous rate limits or private repositories.

A classic GitHub personal access token with read-only scope can be stored here so HTTP requests send an Authorization header.

Don’t share it. If you’re unsure, leave it empty—public downloads usually don’t need it.
stub_tip_technical:
Debug-style text: whether the improvement is enabled in config, whether the file on disk matches the last install, manifest version, etc.

Useful when something breaks and you need the real state.
stub_tip_refresh_technical:
Re-reads yt-dlp on disk and VRCMT’s saved state, then refreshes the technical paragraph and the summary box above.

Use after install/restore or after closing VRChat to see if the file changed.
msg_premium_hint: Go Premium to access playback links
msg_versions_truncated: … and {n} more links not shown (limit {m}). Order: newest first; duplicate URLs hidden.
msg_cloud_not_found: No previous backup found in your PREMIUM account.
